# Delivery Plan

**Created:** 2026-03-04
**Total Phases:** 3

## Summary
Config layering introduces a local/shared config split that 3 other TODO features depend on. Phase 1 builds the foundational resolver and migrates all existing consumers. Phase 2 updates the dashboard and update skill to use the new resolver. Phase 3 rewrites the agent config skill for local-only writes.

## Phase 1 -- Config Resolver Foundation [COMPLETE]
**Features:** config_layering.md
**Completion Commit:** d95f91b
